things.name: Great Blue Hole Dive
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage underwater sinkhole 300m wide and 125m deep - world's greatest dive

things.name: Belize Barrier Reef Snorkelling
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage second largest barrier reef in the world with nurse sharks and rays

things.name: Caracol Maya Ruins
things.description: Largest Maya site in Belize with the tallest man-made structure in the country

things.name: Actun Tunichil Muknal Cave
things.description: Swim into a cave containing Maya skeletal remains and sacrificial artefacts

things.name: Tikal Day Trip (Guatemala)
things.description: The greatest Maya city accessible in 2 hours from Belize

things.name: Xunantunich Maya Site
things.description: Maya temple with a frieze depicting the solar system - panoramic views from the top

things.name: Community Baboon Sanctuary
things.description: Black howler monkey conservation with local Creole villagers as guides

things.name: Lamanai Ruins Boat Tour
things.description: Boat journey through jungle waterways to a spectacular Maya temple complex

things.name: Museum of Belize
things.description: Former colonial prison with Maya jade artefacts and Belize natural history

things.name: Fry Jack with Stew Chicken
things.description: Belize's favourite breakfast - fried dough pillows with stewed chicken and coconut rice
